description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and deploy. Add three test jobs named beta, nightly, and stable that each use the scorpil/rust:<variant> Docker image (beta, nightly, stable respectively) and run the commands: cargo build, cargo build --release, apt-get update, apt-get -y install python python-pip, pip install 'CppHeaderParser>=2.7.2,<3.0.0', and cargo test. Add a deploy-stage pages job that uses scorpil/rust:stable, runs cargo doc, copies target/doc to a public directory, creates public/index.html with a meta refresh to cheddar/index.html, and publishes the public/ folder as an artifact, but only on the master branch.
